items.title: Waiting for the complete translation version.
items.summary: Everything’s going so well. Waiting for the complete version of other language translation. The art? So damn fine. The story? Good enough to feel with the happiness and painful with characters. I don’t think I could play this type of game for more than 1 week but here I am, and still enjoying playing this. If the translation once completed, I’d change to 5 stars for real.
items.author: bygene
